description_long: This is a large wooden half-pipe skate ramp, commonly found in urban parks or recreational areas. The structure features smooth, curved surfaces for skating, with vertical extensions at both ends and sturdy wooden guardrails along the top edges for safety. The ramp is decorated with colorful graffiti art and various stickers, adding an urban, street-culture aesthetic. The surface shows signs of wear and dirt, indicating frequent use. The ramp is constructed primarily from wood, with metal coping along the top edges for grinding. The overall design is robust and functional, providing a challenging and engaging environment for skateboarders and BMX riders.
description: A large wooden half-pipe skate ramp with guardrails, graffiti art, and metal coping, designed for urban recreational use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the vertical face with graffiti art and a smiley character, plus the top guardrails.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the full curved skating surface, both platforms, and additional stickers.
description_view_2: Rear view with a different graffiti mural and more visible wear on the ramp surface.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the other curved surface, peace symbol, and more stickers.
